name: chr9q12_pericentric_HSat3
description: Chromosome 9 q-arm pericentric heterochromatin block (9q12), the largest classical heterochromatin block on any autosome, predominantly HSat3 (ATTCC pentamer arrays) with some HSat2. Highly polymorphic in size (qh+ / qh- variants). Largely unassembled in GRCh38; resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Long tandem HSat3 arrays (ATTCC-based) with embedded HSat2 patches; population-level size polymorphism (qh+/qh-); pseudoautosomal pairing irregularities reported.
